articles.title: Coral Gables firm strikes deal to send fuel to Cuba’s private sector on oil tankers
articles.description: TOPSHOT - A tugboat guides the Russian oil tanker Anatoly Kolodkin at the oil terminal in the port of Matanzas, northwestern Cuba, on March 31, 2026. The Anatoly Kolodkin, a tanker under US sanctions carrying 730,000 barrels of crude, is set to deliver the first crude shipment to Cuba since January after Washington gave the crisis-hit island a reprieve from an effective fuel blockade. (Photo by Yamil LAGE / AFP via Getty Images)

articles.title: Inside Iran: ‘We need to fight this fight’
